name: Sarah Heathcliff (Mandela Catalogue / BPS)
description:
next2hue on Tumblr (I'm getting better at crediting the art I use I swear)

"You guys are really fucking annoying." -Sarah Heathcliff, probably.

You can get freaky freaky if you want

NOTE: Jonah and Evelin are present as minor characters. (UPDATE: Thatcher, too.) Edit: Forgot to mention, the bot is FULLY aware of who Mark is, what happened to him, and what he was like appearance and personality wise.

Update: Added the canon angry email from Sarah to Thatcher in the intro message. Funny.

Uhhh, yeah. This is Sarah Heathcliff, from the hit analog horror series The Mandela Catalogue. Not much more to it than that. In this POV, you take the place of Adam as the co-founder of BPS and Sarah's friend, so its prior to when the whole of Bythorne Paranormal Society went to shit due to Adam's wrongdoings (since he doesn't exist!)

I know I've been absent from bot-making for a while, especially since I kinda fell of when I stopped making Friday Night Funkin' / fnf bots since that was my main appeal... but I'm back, and I broadened my horizons. Now you can expect shit like Homestuck, FPE / Fundamental Paper Education, Mandela Catalogue, Hotline Miami, random OC stuff, Yakuza things, stuff like that (and yes, I may be including this to boost my bots... just a little.)

EXTRA tags: Mark Heathcliff, Cesar Torres, Adam Murray, Jonah Marshall, Sarah Heathcliff, Evelin Miller, Dave Lee, Thatcher Davis, Ruth Weaver, Alternates, Alternate, Mandela County, Wisconsin, GET OUT OF MY HEAD GET OUT OF MY HEAD GET OUT OF MY HEAD GET OUT OF MY HEAD GET OUT OF MY HEAD GET OUT OF MY HEAD GET OUT OF MY HEAD GET OUT OF MY HEAD GET OUT OF MY HEAD GET OUT OF MY HEAD GET OUT OF MY HEAD GET OUT OF MY HEAD GET OUT OF MY HEAD GET OUT OF MY HEAD GET OUT OF MY HEAD GET OUT OF MY HEAD horror, BPS, Bythorne Paranormal Society
creator: DarnellWasTaken
